libraries.hero_subject_emphasis: a balanced room story with one memorable focal point and believable depth
section_roles: anchor vignette around the section's main styling move
close material and texture detail
functional corner or layout moment
styled shelf, console, or decorative surface vignette
finishing-touch composition with personality and restraint

libraries.hero_subject_emphasis: window glow, drape movement, and height-enhancing lines that make the room feel finished
section_roles: wide window-facing room shot with drape movement
close fabric, fold, and hem detail
hardware and rod placement close-up
light-filtering or privacy-focused corner view
styled room shot showing the treatment integrated with the rest of the space
subject_emphasis: curtain styling within the whole room

libraries.hero_subject_emphasis: tactile layering, material contrast, and a room that feels touchable and rich without clutter
section_roles: room-wide shot that shows layered materials working together
tight tactile close-up of fabric and finish interplay
furniture-and-surface composition highlighting material balance
small styling vignette with tactile contrast
quiet finishing composition focused on layered texture

libraries.hero_subject_emphasis: light source, glow quality, and how the fixture shapes the mood of the room
section_roles: room shot led by the lighting statement
fixture detail close-up with surrounding materials
functional reading, bedside, or task-lighting corner
ambient glow shot showing atmosphere
styled composition showing the fixture integrated into the room

libraries.hero_subject_emphasis: functional order that still feels styled, calm, and visually intentional
section_roles: organized room or entryway establishing shot
container or shelf detail with styling restraint
functional drop-zone or organization corner
surface styling that keeps the setup practical
finished organized vignette with warmth and polish

libraries.hero_subject_emphasis: palette harmony, color relationships, and a room that clearly expresses the mood of the scheme
section_roles: room-wide palette-led establishing shot
close-up showing color transitions and materials
furniture or textile composition emphasizing color balance
styled vignette with accent-color use
final composition showing the palette fully resolved

libraries.hero_subject_emphasis: seasonal freshness and atmosphere without turning the room into a themed prop set
section_roles: wide seasonal refresh shot
close-up of seasonal materials or accents
styled mantel, table, or console moment
soft lived-in corner with seasonal cues
final seasonal edit with restraint and cohesion
